---
title: "Clustering I"
subtitle: "k-means and cluster evaluation"
date: "Oct 9, 2026"
date-format: long
---

k-means as an EM-style algorithm; choosing k; silhouette scores and gap statistics; what cluster evaluation actually tells you.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR §10.3

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [slides_clean](slides_clean.pdf)

**Code:** [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [lab1.Rmd](code/lab1.Rmd)

**Supplementary readings:** [Moraru et al. (2025)](readings/Moraru et al. (2025).pdf) [Prabakaran et al. (2019)](readings/Prabakaran et al. (2019).pdf)
